title: docs(sprints): close CI-RED-020-B — main-green witness run 28688610338
intent: SPRINTS.md ledger-only update: flip the CI-RED-020 row from OPEN to CLOSED. The closure bar (the merged API Health + Smoke workflow producing a terminal-green run on `main`) is met by run 28688610338 — the first terminal-green run of the merged workflow on `main` (workflow_dispatch on ref=main, conclusion success, not cancelled), with both `health-smoke` and the main-only `pages-deploy` jobs green. On `main`, workflow_dispatch and schedule run the identical job graph on the identical ref, so this is the functional equivalent of the scheduled witness; the user accepted it as sufficient in lieu of waiting for the ~10:20 UTC cron. Documentation only; no product/application/CI-behavior change. This manifest replaces the inherited docs manifest (from #181) so the CBSP21 gates cover this ledger diff.

diff_articulation.what_changed: SPRINTS.md: the CI-RED-020 index row status changes OPEN -> CLOSED and last_verified 2026-07-03 -> 2026-07-04. The former 'Remaining closure bar' sentence is replaced by a 'Closure witness (2026-07-04)' note citing run 28688610338 — the first terminal-green run of the merged workflow on `main`: event=workflow_dispatch, ref=main, conclusion success, NOT cancelled; health-smoke green (Preflight -> smoke -> Assert smoke witness present -> badge upload) and pages-deploy green (Configure/Upload/Deploy to GitHub Pages), the latter being the main-only path carrying the former github-pages structural block that was branch-skipped in the pre-merge witnesses. Records that on `main` workflow_dispatch and schedule run the identical job graph (the workflow never branches on event_name) so this is the functional equivalent of the scheduled witness, accepted by the user as sufficient. .cbsp21/patch_input.json: replaced the inherited docs manifest with this ledger-close manifest declaring the diff (SPRINTS.md) so the CBSP21 scope + coverage gates cover this PR.

commands_run: Witness: gh run view 28688610338 -> conclusion success; jobs health-smoke=success, pages-deploy=success; load-bearing steps (smoke, Assert smoke witness present, Deploy to GitHub Pages) all success.
local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS; check_cbsp21_gate.py -> 100% coverage PASS.
